title: Mayerling
writer: Claude Anet, Irma von Cube, Joseph Kessel
actors: Charles Boyer, Danielle Darrieux, Marthe Régnier
plot: Rudolf, Crown Prince of Austria, is fettered on all sides. He's bored; his father, the emperor, is domineering; his politics are more liberal than his father's, but he knows his views carry no weight. He agrees to marry a princess...
